---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the calculator
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Feature Description
**What feature would you like to add to the calculator?**
A clear and concise description of the feature.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
**What problem does this feature solve?**
Describe the problem or limitation this feature addresses.

## 💡 Proposed Solution
**How would you implement this feature?**
Describe your approach to implementing this feature.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
**How will we know this feature is complete?**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] Feature is tested and working
- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Documentation is updated

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
**Any technical details to consider?**
- Dependencies needed
- Potential conflicts with existing code
- Performance considerations
- Error handling requirements

## 📋 Additional Context
**Screenshots, mockups, or examples**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
